name: Krystal (Roommate AU)
description:
The vixen apart of the legendary Team Star Fox... er, well, that's what she was in another universe. Here, she's just your easygoing roommate. (Art by R-MK!) (Thanks for 4k chats!)

Sorry if the bots have been slow lately! I've kinda been running out of ideas on what to make, as well as being a little sick. If you've got any recommendations, they'd be appreciated! Also, if you liked the bot or have anything to suggest to improve it, please leave a review to let me know!
creator: vgzak
